server_scripts.name: alias
PR Validate supplier company
DN - Item Tax Template
PR - Item Tax Template
Quot - Item Tax Template
Get Filtered Customers
server_scripts.script:
company = frappe.form_dict.company

customers = []

if company:
    customers = frappe.db.get_all("Customer", filters={"company": company, "disabled": 0}, pluck="name")
    x = frappe.db.get_all("Allowed To Transact With", filters={"company": company, "parentfield": "companies", "parenttype": "Customer"}, pluck="parent")
    if x and len(x):
        customers = customers + x

customers = frappe.utils.unique(customers)

frappe.response["message"] = customers

server_scripts.name: get_filtered_supplier
server_scripts.script:
company = frappe.form_dict.company

suppliers = []

if company:
    customers = frappe.db.get_all("Supplier", filters={"company": company, "disabled": 0}, pluck="name")
    x = frappe.db.get_all("Allowed To Transact With", filters={"company": company, "parentfield": "companies", "parenttype": "Supplier"}, pluck="parent")
    if x and len(x):
        suppliers = suppliers + x

suppliers = frappe.utils.unique(suppliers)

frappe.response["message"] = suppliers

server_scripts.name: PO Validate supplier company
PO - Item Tax Template
Pull Bundles from DO
PI Validate supplier company
PI - Item Tax Template
SI - Item Tax Template
SI validate customer company
Get VAT Emirate
Permission Query for Delivery Note
server_scripts.script:
# Get allowed Sales Persons for current user
sales_persons = frappe.get_all(
    "User Permission",
    filters={"user": frappe.session.user, "allow": "Sales Person"},
    pluck="for_value"
)

# If no user permissions for Sales Person → show all Sales Orders
if not sales_persons:
    conditions = "1=1"
else:
    # Escape each value to prevent SQL injection
    sales_persons_sql = ", ".join([frappe.db.escape(sp) for sp in sales_persons])

    conditions = (
        "EXISTS ("
        "SELECT 1 FROM `tabSales Team` "
        "WHERE `tabSales Team`.parent = `tabSales Order`.name "
        "AND `tabSales Team`.parenttype = 'Sales Order' "
        "AND `tabSales Team`.sales_person IN (" + sales_persons_sql + ")"
        ")"
    )

# Final line must be the string condition
conditions

server_scripts.name: PO Auto Share with Write Access
ADD BATCH BUNDLE PR
server_scripts.script:
mismatch_messages = []
creation_plan = []

if not doc.custom_inter_company_do:
    # Exit early if not inter-company transfer
    pass
else:
    dn_name = doc.custom_inter_company_do
    if not frappe.db.exists("Delivery Note", dn_name):
        frappe.throw(f"Linked Delivery Note '{dn_name}' invalid.")

    dn_doc = frappe.get_doc("Delivery Note", dn_name)

    # Map DN items by (item_code, qty) for matching
    dn_items_map = {}
    for d_item in dn_doc.items:
        key = (d_item.item_code, float(d_item.qty))
        if key not in dn_items_map:
            dn_items_map[key] = []
        dn_items_map[key].append(d_item)

    # Match PR items with DN items
    for pr_item in doc.items:
        key = (pr_item.item_code, float(pr_item.qty))
        if key not in dn_items_map or not dn_items_map[key]:
            mismatch_messages.append(
                f"Row #{pr_item.idx}: No matching DN item for {pr_item.item_code}, Qty {pr_item.qty}."
            )
            continue

        dn_item = dn_items_map[key].pop(0)
        pr_item.delivery_note_item = dn_item.name

        dn_bundle_name = dn_item.serial_and_batch_bundle
        dn_batch_no = dn_item.batch_no

        if not dn_bundle_name and not dn_batch_no:
            # No batch tracking for this item, skip
            continue

        creation_plan.append({
            "pr_item": pr_item,
            "dn_bundle_name": dn_bundle_name,
            "dn_batch_no": dn_batch_no,
            "dn_item": dn_item
        })

    if mismatch_messages:
        frappe.throw("Mismatch found:\n" + "\n".join(mismatch_messages))

    # STEP 1: Pre-create batches with correct manufacturing dates
    for row in creation_plan:
        dn_bundle_name = row["dn_bundle_name"]
        dn_batch_no = row["dn_batch_no"]
        pr_item = row["pr_item"]

        if dn_bundle_name:
            # Handle multiple batches from bundle
            existing_dn_bundle = frappe.get_doc("Serial and Batch Bundle", dn_bundle_name)

            for entry_line in existing_dn_bundle.entries:
                batch_no = entry_line.batch_no
                if not batch_no:
                    continue

                # Check if batch already exists in receiving company
                if not frappe.db.exists("Batch", batch_no):
                    # Get original batch details from sending company
                    dn_batch_doc = frappe.get_doc("Batch", batch_no)

                    # Create new batch with preserved dates
                    new_batch = frappe.new_doc("Batch")
                    new_batch.batch_id = batch_no
                    new_batch.item = pr_item.item_code
                    new_batch.manufacturing_date = dn_batch_doc.manufacturing_date
                    new_batch.expiry_date = dn_batch_doc.expiry_date

                    # Copy other relevant fields
                    if dn_batch_doc.supplier:
                        new_batch.supplier = dn_batch_doc.supplier
                    if dn_batch_doc.description:
                        new_batch.description = dn_batch_doc.description

                    new_batch.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
                    frappe.msgprint(f"Created Batch {batch_no} with manufacturing date {dn_batch_doc.manufacturing_date}", alert=True)

        elif dn_batch_no:
            # Handle single batch
            if not frappe.db.exists("Batch", dn_batch_no):
                dn_batch_doc = frappe.get_doc("Batch", dn_batch_no)

                new_batch = frappe.new_doc("Batch")
                new_batch.batch_id = dn_batch_no
                new_batch.item = pr_item.item_code
                new_batch.manufacturing_date = dn_batch_doc.manufacturing_date
                new_batch.expiry_date = dn_batch_doc.expiry_date

                if dn_batch_doc.supplier:
                    new_batch.supplier = dn_batch_doc.supplier
                if dn_batch_doc.description:
                    new_batch.description = dn_batch_doc.description

                new_batch.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
                frappe.msgprint(f"Created Batch {dn_batch_no} with manufacturing date {dn_batch_doc.manufacturing_date}", alert=True)

    # STEP 2: Create bundles (batches now exist with correct dates)
    for row in creation_plan:
        pr_item = row["pr_item"]
        dn_bundle_name = row["dn_bundle_name"]
        dn_batch_no = row["dn_batch_no"]

        new_bundle_doc = frappe.new_doc("Serial and Batch Bundle")
        new_bundle_doc.naming_series = "SABB-.########"
        new_bundle_doc.company = doc.company
        new_bundle_doc.item_code = pr_item.item_code
        new_bundle_doc.warehouse = pr_item.warehouse
        new_bundle_doc.type_of_transaction = "Inward"
        new_bundle_doc.voucher_type = "Purchase Receipt"
        new_bundle_doc.voucher_no = doc.name
        new_bundle_doc.voucher_detail_no = pr_item.name
        new_bundle_doc.posting_date = doc.posting_date
        new_bundle_doc.posting_time = doc.posting_time

        if dn_bundle_name:
            # Copy entries from DN bundle
            existing_dn_bundle = frappe.get_doc("Serial and Batch Bundle", dn_bundle_name)
            for entry_line in existing_dn_bundle.entries:
                new_bundle_doc.append("entries", {
                    "batch_no": entry_line.batch_no,
                    "qty": abs(float(entry_line.qty)),
                    "incoming_rate": float(pr_item.rate or 0),
                    "warehouse": pr_item.warehouse
                })
        else:
            # Single batch entry
            new_bundle_doc.append("entries", {
                "batch_no": dn_batch_no,
                "qty": float(pr_item.qty),
                "incoming_rate": float(pr_item.rate or 0),
                "warehouse": pr_item.warehouse
            })

        # Save the bundle
        new_bundle_doc.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

        # Link to PR item
        pr_item.serial_and_batch_bundle = new_bundle_doc.name

        # Set batch_no for single batch items
        if not dn_bundle_name and dn_batch_no:
            pr_item.batch_no = dn_batch_no

server_scripts.name: Delivery Date
server_scripts.script:
for item in doc.items:
    item.delivery_date = doc.delivery_date

server_scripts.name: SO submit date
server_scripts.script:
doc.custom_sales_order_confirmation_date = frappe.utils.nowdate()
doc.save()

conditions
